input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.1.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: the track and center of gravity must combine to provide sufficient rollover stability.  see

            rule V.1.3.1: The track and center of gravity must combine to provide sufficient rollover stability.  See
V.1.3.1 The track and center of gravity must combine to provide sufficient rollover stability.  See

final_answer: The track and center of gravity must combine to provide sufficient rollover stability.
